description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Checks that runs on every pull request to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET Core 3.1.102 and Node.js 10.x, prepares a preview comment, checks the build by installing npm dependencies, copying files, building and publishing with dotnet, and then deploys a preview to surge.sh. Finally, show the preview link in a comment.
